zh.lifeSummary: 當TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND於大約1215年出生在愛爾蘭蒙斯特時，他的父親Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain30歲，母親Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen"19歲。他於1230年與Finola O'Brien在愛爾蘭蒙斯特迪 本 吉拉阿洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1259年在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯享年45歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND于大约1215年出生在爱尔兰蒙斯特时，他的父亲Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain30岁，母亲Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen"19岁。他于1230年与Finola O'Brien在爱尔兰蒙斯特迪 本 吉拉阿洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1259年在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯享年45岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: TEIGE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish Feygl ‘bird’ (modern German Vogel; compare Zipporah ). The present form of the name was arrived at by back-formation, the final -l having been interpreted as a Yiddish diminutive suffix rather than an integral part of the word.

nameMeanings.name: CAEL
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; perhaps a variant of   Kale   or a transferred use of a surname.

variants.name: Kale
meanings: Of uncertain origin, perhaps an Anglicized form of the Irish name Cathal. It may have been invented as a masculine equivalent of   Kayley   and its variants.

en.lifeSummary: When TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND was born about 1215, in Munster, Ireland, his father, Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain, was 30 and his mother, Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen", was 19. He married Finola O'Brien in 1230, in Diocese of Killaloe, Munster, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1259, in Ennis, County Clare, Ireland, at the age of 45, and was buried in Ennis, County Clare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND est né environ 1215, à Munster, Irlande, son père, Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen", avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Finola O'Brien en 1230, à Diocese of Killaloe, Munster, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1259, à Ennis, County Clare, Irlande, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Ennis, County Clare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND um 1215 in Munster, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain 30 und seine Mutter Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen" 19. Er hat 1230 in Diocese of Killaloe, Munster, Irland Finola O'Brien geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1259 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Ennis, County Clare, Irland und wurde in Ennis, County Clare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND è nato il circa 1215 nel Munster, Irlanda, il suo padre, Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen", aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Finola O'Brien nel 1230, nel Diocese of Killaloe, Munster, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1259, nel Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMONDが約1215年にアイルランドムンスターで生まれた時，父Conchobhar an Suidane O Briainは30歳，母Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen"は19歳であった。1230年にアイルランドムンスターディオセゼ オフ キラロでFinola O'Brienと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1259年にアイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスで45歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND(이)가 대략 1215년 아일랜드 먼스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen"(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1230년 아일랜드 먼스터 디오스스 프 킬라로이에서 Finola O'Brien(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1259년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Munster, Irlanda, seu pai, Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen", tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Finola O'Brien em 1230, em Diocese of Killaloe, Munster, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1259, em Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND родился около 1215 г. в местности мунстир, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen", 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Finola O'Brien в 1230 г. в местности диосес оф киллало, мунстир, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1259 г. в местности эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия.

sm.from 1258 to 1259: mai le 1258 e o'o I le 1259

es.lifeSummary: Cuando TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND nació aproximadamente 1215, en Munster, Irlanda, su papá, Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen", tenía 19 años. Se casó con Finola O'Brien en 1230, en Diocese of Killaloe, Munster, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1259, en Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.
